personality_one_liner: A cinematic, video-first experience using liquid glass overlays and deep obsidian tones to let content shine.

spacing.rule: Generous padding around content, safe-area clearance at root. 44x44pt min hit targets.

do's: Floating control pill at the bottom of the video player.
Overlay content box on the Home hero card.
dont's: Form fields or body text regions.
Every single list row or card.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Curated library of DASH sample streams with anticipatory shelves and a prominent cinematic hero card.

states.loading: Skeleton cards mimicking grid with pulse animation.
states.empty: No streams available. Illustration with reload CTA.
states.error: Failed to load streams. Show 'Try Again' button.

screens.layout: 1. Header: Transparent with brand wordmark. 2. Hero Section: Full-bleed image card. Gradient scrim (top->bottom transparent to surface) MUST sit over image. Glassmorphic content box (Title, DRM badge, Play button) at bottom 30%. 3. Scrollable chip row (SD, HD, DRM). 4. Horizontal shelves for categories (Because you watched, Trending). 5. Floating ABC (Always Be Continuing) mini-player above the tab bar if a video was playing.

screens.name: Player
screens.purpose: Immersive, gesture-driven video playback interface for DASH/MPD streams.

states.loading: Centered loading spinner on black background.
states.error: Readable error message indicating stream or DRM failure + Retry CTA.

screens.layout: 1. Base: Full-screen video surface. 2. Gesture Area: Double tap left/right to skip 10s. Tap center to toggle controls. 3. Overlay: Absolute filled. Top header with back button and settings icon (glass pill). 4. Bottom Control Bar: Floating glass pill above safe-area bottom containing Play/Pause, current time, seek bar slider, total time, subtitle icon, fullscreen toggle. 5. Controls use Reanimated to fade out after 3s of inactivity.

screens.name: StreamDetailsSheet
screens.purpose: Draggable bottom sheet showing stream metadata, quality selection, and subtitle tracks.
screens.layout: Gorhom bottom-sheet popping up over Home or Player. Glassmorphic header with drag handle. Scrollable list of selectable options (Quality: Auto, 4K, 1080p | Speed: 1x, 1.5x) using surfaceSecondary for rows and brandPrimary checkmarks for selected items.

hero_thumbnail.alt: Cinematic sci-fi poster for Tears of Steel DASH sample

thumbnail_animation.alt: 3D Animation character for Big Buck Bunny sample

instructions_to_main_agent: Core Requirement: Use `react-native-video` (v6+) for MPEG-DASH and DRM (Widevine/ClearKey) support. Standard Expo AV cannot play DASH/DRM streams natively.
Home Hero Image: MUST have a gradient scrim (top to bottom, transparent to surface) between the image and overlaid text. Place the title and play button in the bottom 30%.
Player Controls Overlay: Use `react-native-reanimated` to smoothly fade controls in and out based on user taps or a 3-second inactivity timeout. Do not use standard RN Animation.
Player Interactivity: Use `react-native-gesture-handler` for double-tap to skip (left/right sides of screen) and smooth seek bar sliding.
Glassmorphism: Use `expo-blur` with a translucent tinted base underneath (≥70% of surface) to ensure text readability on player floating controls and tab bar.
Haptics: Add subtle haptic feedback (using expo-haptics) on quality selection, play/pause toggle, and double-tap skips.
